business.headline: Supreme Court closes Sandesara fraud case after Rs 5,000 crore settlementDuring the proceedings, the Sandesara Group paid Rs 3,507 crore directly to the lending consortium, while an additional Rs 1,192 crore was recovered through liquidation. In its compliance order dated December 17, 2025, the Supreme Court recorded a final settlement deposit of Rs 5,111.43 crore.

War-led energy crisis could drag global growth to 2%: IMFAs conflict in West Asia deepens, the IMF warns energy shocks could push global growth toward near-recession levels, exposing fragile economies while inflation remains stubbornly elevated across markets.

IMF raises India FY27 GDP to 6.5% despite global conflict headwindsOne of the key reasons behind the improved outlook is a reduction in additional US tariffs on Indian goods. These tariffs have come down from 50% to 10%, easing pressure on exports.
EPFO new rule: Members can delink wrong Member IDs from UANThe updated system is expected to reduce confusion caused by duplicate or incorrect provident fund accounts.

IEA slashes oil demand and supply view as Iran war rattles markets: ReportThe ongoing conflict in Iran has forced the IEA to revise global oil market predictions, signalling reduced supply and demand growth amid geopolitical tensions.

SIPs are rising, but is retail conviction in equities slowing? Here's the answerRecord SIP numbers suggest confidence, yet other signals point to caution. Retail investors are not exiting equities — they are simply investing with greater care and clarity.

New TRACES portal launched: How will it change your TDS filing experience?The Income Tax Department has rolled out a new TRACES portal aimed at improving usability and speeding up processes. But how much difference will it actually make to your TDS filing experience?

Earn Rs 12 lakh or Rs 30 lakh? See how your gratuity changes with 50% basic payIn Part 1, we explained how take-home may fall despite the same CTC. Here, we look at how the 50% rule impacts long-term benefits like gratuity.

Unclaimed assets: How to recover your money from banks, shares, EPF and insuranceUnclaimed money is not lost, but recovering it requires awareness, documentation and persistence, making early action crucial before delays and low returns quietly erode its real value over time.

Markets fall, Adani Power hits all-time high: What's driving the surge?Adani Power's rally highlights how strong demand outlook and defensive positioning can drive select stocks higher, even as broader markets struggle with uncertainty and lack of sustained momentum.

From April to March: Here are all the key FY27 tax deadlines you must trackThe tax calendar may seem long, but staying aware of these dates can make things much simpler. Instead of rushing at the last minute, spreading out your compliance and investments across the year can help you avoid stress and penalties.

Gold down over Rs 1,200, silver slips Rs 6,000: Is this a dip worth buying?Precious metals have slipped noticeably, with gold and silver both under pressure. For investors, this raises a familiar dilemma, i.e., is this the right moment to step in or stay on the sidelines?

Motherson clarifies on Noida workers' protest, says driven by misinformationIn a filing to stock exchanges, the company said recent developments reported in the media relate to labour protests in Noida and some other cities, and are not specific to any one company.

Retail inflation rises to 3.40% in March from 3.21% in FebruaryThe year-on-year inflation rate, based on All India Consumer Price Index (CPI), stood at 3.40% (Provisional) in March 2026. This is slightly higher than February's 3.21%, but still below the 4% mark that is often seen as manageable.

8th Pay Commission meetings: Should govt employees expect a pay revision soon?After months of speculation, the 8th Pay Commission process has picked up pace. With meetings now scheduled, the big question remains, i.e., should government employees expect a pay revision anytime soon?

Sensex ends 700 points lower, Nifty below 23,900; auto stocks hit hardMarkets may have steadied after early losses, but rising oil prices and geopolitical risks continue to cloud sentiment, keeping investors cautious and leaving the near-term outlook uncertain and volatile.

Maruti, Eicher Motors, other auto stocks tumble: What's behind the fall?Maruti Suzuki fell over 4%, while Eicher Motors dropped nearly 5%, making them among the top losers on the Nifty 50. Other auto names also saw weakness, even as the broader market pared some of its early losses.

Ambanis lead Asia's 10 richest families in 2026: Check who else is on the listAt number one is the Ambani family, with a net worth of about $89.7 billion. Their flagship company, Reliance Industries, continues to expand across energy, telecom, retail and financial services.

When employers evade, enforcement looks awaySystemic gaps in enforcement, coupled with deliberate non-compliance, leave workers outside legal protection, raising a larger question: whether labour laws exist merely on paper or are meant to be enforced.

New labour codes explained: How your salary, PF, and gratuity will changeEmployees should ask four key questions: What's my actual wage base? Is PF on capped or full wages? Is this just a salary split change? And am I gaining long-term benefits?

entertainment.headline: Harvey Weinstein retrial begins in New York with new evidence twist in rape case Harvey Weinstein retrial begins in New York with new evidence twist in rape case

Samay Raina shares unseen apology clips from dark phase, says felt like a corpse Comedian Samay Raina opened up about his toughest phase during the India's Got Latent row. He also revealed he recorded several apology videos he never shared online.

Varun Dhawan claps back at influencer alleging fake reviews for Hai Jawani teaser A social media row broke out after a Delhi-based influencer accused actor Varun Dhawan of orchestrating fake reviews for the teaser of his upcoming film Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai. The actor responded to the claims, triggering a public exchange that has drawn attention.

Is Ranveer Singh's ad with Prakash Padukone a dig at Dhruv Rathee? Fans think so Actor Ranveer Singh's new ad with father-in-law Prakash Padukone is going viral, with fans spotting a cheeky Dhruv Rathee nod. Meanwhile, the Dhurandhar franchise is smashing records, having crossed Rs 3,000 crore worldwide.

Nani reveals he wouldn't have produced Adivi Sesh's Dacoit. Here's why Actor Nani, in a promotional interview with Adivi Sesh, praised his recent film Dacoit, calling it better than his films Major and Goodachari.

Ram Charan calls himself a rough dad, praises Upasana for being the nurturer Actor Ram Charan has opened up about his parenting style, calling himself a 'rough dad' while describing wife Upasana Kamineni as the nurturing force in their family. The couple have a three-year-old daughter and welcomed twins earlier this year.

Yumi's Cells 3 first impression: Kim Go-eun makes a confident return Yumi's Cells 3 marks a vibrant and emotionally charged return, with a mix of humour and heartfelt moments through Kim Go-eun's relatable portrayal of Yumi. The new season introduces fresh romantic tensions and intriguing character dynamics.

India's No 1 Senorita: Farhan Akhtar honours Asha Bhosle at Jalandhar concert Farhan Akhtar paid heartfelt tribute to legendary singer Asha Bhosle during a college fest. The actor-singer noted her as "India's No. 1 Senorita", celebrating her timeless influence on Indian music and generations of listeners.

Shah Rukh Khan to have a cameo in Allu Arjun-Atlee's Raaka: Sources Shah Rukh Khan is reportedly set to make a cameo in Raaka, starring Allu Arjun and directed by Atlee, marking a major crossover moment in Indian cinema.

Akshay Kumar inspired Adivi Sesh to tell South stories in Hindi. Here's how In an exclusive conversation, Adivi Sesh shared how an Akshay Kumar film inspired him to tell South Indian stories in Hindi, aiming to reach a wider audience. His new film Dacoit is a bilingual film set in the South.

Remembering Satish Kaushik: Co-star on a life of resilience, loss and strength On Satish Kaushik's 70th birth anniversary, co-star Darasing Khurana reflects on the deeply personal lessons the late actor left behind. From self-acceptance to resilience, his words reveal a side of Kaushik beyond cinema.

Rs 3,000 crore for Dhurandhar franchise: India's 1st, beats Pushpa-Baahubali series Dhurandhar has rewritten the rules of Indian box office success, crossing the Rs 3,000-crore mark and leaving rival franchises behind. But the real story lies in how it achieved this milestone, and what it signals for Bollywood's global future.

Huma Qureshi recalls when Ed Sheeran called Gangs of Wasseypur really cool Huma Qureshi recently shared a delightful encounter with global star Ed Sheeran, who praised the Indian cult classic Gangs of Wasseypur. The British singer expressed his admiration for Indian cinema and culture.

Ahaan Panday to reunite with Saiyaara director Mohit Suri Ahaan Panday is reportedly set to reunite with director Mohit Suri for a new romantic drama backed by Yash Raj Films after the success of Saiyaara. The project is said to be in development, with the script being reworked and filming expected to begin later this year.

Not happening soon: Tejasswi Prakash dismisses wedding rumours with Karan Kundrra Tejasswi Prakash has clarified that there are no immediate plans to marry her partner Karan Kundrra, putting recent rumours to rest. The duo began dating after appearing together on Bigg Boss 15.

Alia-Ranbir are on a dreamy anniversary vacation in snow with Raha: Video and pics Alia Bhatt shared glimpses of her serene snowy vacation with Ranbir Kapoor and daughter Raha on the couple's fourth wedding anniversary. The dreamy visuals of snow-covered landscapes and family moments quickly captured attention online.

Vijay receives wedding pic with Sangeetha from fan amid divorce. Watch his reaction Thalapathy Vijay is actively campaigning across Tamil Nadu as he prepares for his party's first assembly election. At a rally, a fan gifted a photo frame of Vijay and Sangeetha along with Vijayakanth.

Who is Juhi Bhatt? All about Ranveer Allahbadia's partner and influencer Ranveer Allahbadia has confirmed his relationship with content creator Juhi Bhatt during an IPL outing. The couple's appearance at the MI vs RCB match quickly caught social media's attention.

Is Hanumankind collaborating with BTS label HYBE? Here's what we know Indian rapper Hanumankind sparked collaboration buzz after attending BTS' concert in Seoul and interacting with HYBE chairman Bang Si-hyuk. While talks with HYBE Corporation are still at an early stage, a potential collaboration with its newer K-pop groups is being explored.

general news.headline: Hormuz, bilateral cooperation: What PM Modi, Trump discussed on 40-minute callA 40-minute call between PM Modi and Donald Trump signals continued high-level engagement, but what key issues were discussed and how will it shape the next phase of India-US relations?

Iran talks 2.0 may happen in next two days in Pak, says Trump. Then praises MunirTrump's latest remarks come as tensions between the United States and Iran escalate following the American blockade of Iranian ports, with Tehran threatening regional strikes in response. The showdown over the Strait of Hormuz risks reigniting hostilities and deepening the regional war's economic fallout.

No reprieve: US ends Iran oil waiver, ramps up pressure in Hormuz standoffThe US will not extend a waiver allowing Iranian oil sales past April 19, warning banks of sanctions as it intensifies pressure on Tehran amid rising tensions and a Hormuz blockade.

Diplomats criss-cross globe as US-Iran ceasefire ticks downWith one week remaining in the ceasefire between the US and Iran, diplomatic activity is accelerating across multiple fronts to bring both sides back to the table and secure an agreement acceptable to all.

Is Ranveer Singh's ad with Prakash Padukone a dig at Dhruv Rathee? Fans think soActor Ranveer Singh's new ad with father-in-law Prakash Padukone is going viral, with fans spotting a cheeky Dhruv Rathee nod. Meanwhile, the Dhurandhar franchise is smashing records, having crossed Rs 3,000 crore worldwide.

Undercover women cops, Malaysia-linked preacher: TCS Nashik conversion case widensA February tip-off about suspicious activities at a TCS BPO campus in Nashik triggered a covert police operation, with undercover women constables posing as staff. The probe, backed by WhatsApp chats, testimonies and a suspected Malaysia-linked preacher, indicates a wider network within the office.

Employee quits in 7 days over 'toxic behaviour,' HR denies salary on WhatsAppOn Reddit's r/IndianWorkplace, the employee shared a post titled, "Company refused to pay because I resigned within a week due to toxic behavior." The employee had joined a small firm with a team of around 20 people as a marketing executive at a salary of Rs 5.04 lakh per annum.

What blockade? 5 Iran-linked ships transit Hormuz on Day 1, cock a snook at TrumpUS President Donald Trump announced a blockade, vowing to prevent even a single ship from entering or leaving Iran's ports. However, on Day 1 of the naval blockade, four Iran-linked tankers and a bulk carrier transited through the Strait of Hormuz, as if in open defiance of Trump.

Samay Raina shares unseen apology clips from dark phase, says felt like a corpseComedian Samay Raina opened up about his toughest phase during the India's Got Latent row. He also revealed he recorded several apology videos he never shared online.

I was at Ambedkar's birthday bash in Noida, saw biryani, bikes edge out politicsThe birth anniversary celebration of Bhimrao Ambedkar turned Noida's green Rashtriya Dalit Prerna Sthal into a sea of blue. Bheem Geets blared, bike stunts performed and bhandaras of biryani and chole kulche were doled out. Dalit politics was reserved for another day.

Live: Lebanon rejects Hezbollah 'occupation', Israel envoy says after talksUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: The unfolding crisis in the Strait of Hormuz marks a dangerous escalation in already fragile US-Iran relations, with a sweeping American naval blockade of Iranian ports taking effect at 7:30 IST. President Donald Trump has threated that Iran wants a deal "very badly" and revealing that he was contacted by the "appropriate people" seeking negotiations, even as he warned that any Iranian "fast attack ships" approaching the blockade "will be immediately ELIMINATED". The blockade follows failed weekend talks in Pakistan, where both sides blamed each other for the collapse, with the US citing Iran's refusal to abandon its nuclear ambitions and Tehran accusing Washington of "maximalism, shifting goalposts and blockade", further deepening mistrust. Meanwhile, Iran has rejected the move outright, calling restrictions on maritime movement an illegal act, while its leadership has signalled it will not surrender under threats. On the ground, the situation remains tense, with Iran's armed forces placed on maximum combat alert. The ripple effects are already visible, as oil prices surge past $100 per barrel. France, United Kingdom and European Union called for efforts to restore freedom of navigation in one of the world's most critical trade routes. At the same time, ongoing exchanges of attacks between the Israeli military and Hezbollah in Lebanon have stalled diplomatic efforts. Some US officals inducted that as of now diplomatic channels remain strained but not entirely closed. Follow indiatoday.in for live updates.

United against Hezbollah: Israel, Lebanon hold first direct talks in decadesIsrael and Lebanon held first direct talks in decades, finding rare alignment on Hezbollah, but continued fighting, mistrust and the group's absence highlight the challenges to any lasting diplomatic breakthrough. Israeli Ambassador to the US Yechiel Leiter described the talks in strikingly positive terms, pointing to what he called a convergence of views on Hezbollah's role in Lebanon.

Varun Dhawan claps back at influencer alleging fake reviews for Hai Jawani teaserA social media row broke out after a Delhi-based influencer accused actor Varun Dhawan of orchestrating fake reviews for the teaser of his upcoming film Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai. The actor responded to the claims, triggering a public exchange that has drawn attention.

Live: Class 10 results on April 15? Create DigiLocker accountCBSE Board Class 10 Result 2026 Live Updates: The Central Board of Secondary Education is likely to release the Class 10 results tomorrow, say sources. Once declared, students can check their results on cbseresults.nic.in, cbse.gov.in, and results.cbse.nic.in using their roll number and date of birth. Marksheets will also be available on DigiLocker and the UMANG App.

Did Pakistan fail to pay? Confusion swirls over US-Iran talks hotel bill rowConflicting reports over unpaid hotel bills during US-Iran talks in Islamabad have sparked confusion and scrutiny, overshadowing Pakistan's diplomatic efforts, though officials and hotel management dispute the claims.

Saudi urges US to lift Hormuz blockade amid fears of Red Sea oil crisisSaudi Arabia is urging the US to lift its Hormuz blockade and resume Iran talks, warning escalation could disrupt Red Sea routes and trigger wider global energy and shipping crises.

Rs 3,000 crore for Dhurandhar franchise: India's 1st, beats Pushpa-Baahubali seriesDhurandhar has rewritten the rules of Indian box office success, crossing the Rs 3,000-crore mark and leaving rival franchises behind. But the real story lies in how it achieved this milestone, and what it signals for Bollywood's global future.

Fitness trainer dies by suicide, family claims harassment by married womanA 27-year-old fitness trainer was found hanging at his home in Bengaluru, with his family alleging that he was being blackmailed by a married woman, with whom he was in a relationship, over money and property.

Video: In first naval operation, Baloch rebels kill Pak soldiers off Gwadar coastThe Baloch Liberation Army (BLA) conducted its first naval operation in the Jiwani region of Gwadar and killed three Pakistani coast guard soldiers. A video, shared by the BLA's media wing Hakkal, shows Baloch rebels on a speed boat using machine guns to attack the Pakistani personnel.

Telugu speech therapist in UK fails to understand patients' English, gets firedAn Indian-origin speech and language therapist was fired from her job in the UK after failing to communicate and understand patients' English. The therapist claimed English as her first language and got her job, but was quickly caught for her lack of English proficiency.

Because I am not Black: Musk calls South Africa racist in tirade over StarlinkTesla boss Elon Musk has reignited a global debate over race-based policies in his birthplace, South Africa. He accused the regime of racial discrimination after it stalled its Starlink plans. South Africa is insisting Musk either comply with local laws or take his Starlink venture elsewhere.

Xi Jinping offers 4-point peace proposal for US-Iran war after Pak talks derailXi Jinping floated a four-point proposal for lasting peace in the region during Abu Dhabi Crown Prince Sheikh Khaled bin Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan's visit to Beijing.

I thought she had courage, was wrong: Trump blasts Meloni over Iran war stanceUS President Donald Trump said he was "shocked" at Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni for not toeing Washington's stance on Iran war and her defence of Pope Leo, asserting that "she was no longer the same person."

Lok Sabha strength to rise from 543 to 850, setting stage for women's reservationThe government has shared the draft bill with MPs ahead of a likely push to amend the Constitution. If implemented, the new Lok Sabha will comprise 850 members, up from its current strength of 543.

sports.headline: KKR woes deepen: Ajinkya Rahane fined after Chepauk loss to CSK Kolkata Knight Riders captain Ajinkya Rahane has been fined after his side maintained a slow over-rate during their 32-run defeat to Chennai Super Kings in the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai.

Barcelona vs Atletico: Fermin Lopez suffers horror injury in quarter-finals Fermin Lopez suffered a nasty facial injury after being struck by Juan Musso's boot during Barcelona's Champions League quarter-final clash against Atletico Madrid. The incident led to a lengthy stoppage as the midfielder received treatment on the pitch.

After CSK win two in a row, Ruturaj feels it's coming together for Chennai IPL 2026: Chennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad said it is "coming together slowly" for his side after the five-time IPL winners recorded a second consecutive win, beating Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs. Notably, CSK won two in a row for the first time since April 2024.

Yet to win a game, Ajinkya Rahane urges KKR to stay positive after loss vs CSK KKR captain Ajinkya Rahane had to face the broadcasters after the team remained winless in the Indian Premier League 2026. Chasing 193, KKR faltered in Chennai and lost the game by 32 runs.

Candidates Chess: R Vaishali draws with Zhongyi, stays in contention for the title Indian Grandmaster R Vaishali held her nerve to stay in the hunt for the title at the FIDE Women's Candidates Tournament 2026, playing out a crucial draw against China's Tan Zhongyi in the penultimate round on Tuesday.

Uzbekistan's Sindarov sets up World Championship title clash with Gukesh Uzbekistan's rising star Javokhir Sindarov stamped his authority on the global stage by winning the 2026 Candidates Chess Tournament on Tuesday, earning the right to challenge reigning world champion D Gukesh for the crown later this year.

New year, same old KKR as CSK apply spin choke at Chepauk IPL 2026, CSK vs KKR: Chennai Super Kings racked up back-to-back wins as they beat the Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs on Wednesday at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. With the defeat, KKR stayed winless and at the bottom of the table.

Javier Mascherano resigns as Inter Miami head coach after historic MLS Cup win Javier Mascherano has resigned as head coach of Inter Miami CF, just four months after leading the team to its first MLS Cup title. The club said the Argentine stepped down due to "personal reasons."

Rs 10,000 for a bus ride? USA sets ridiculous fares for FIFA World Cup FIFA World Cup: The city of Boston has announced a paid bus service, the "Boston Stadium Express," for the FIFA World Cup 2026, costing Rs 8,840.90 per round trip to Gillette Stadium. The service, operated with Yankee Line, is part of broader concerns over rising costs and accessibility for fans attending the tournament.

Fast bowler Mayank Yadav fit to play against RCB, says Tom Moody RCB vs LSG: Lucknow Super Giants have their best fast bowlers fit and ready for their next game against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. LSG could have the services of Mayank Yadav, one of India's fast bowlers, back for the RCB game.

US Soccer Federation sporting director leaves just two months before World Cup Matt Crocker has resigned as the sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation just two months before the World Cup. He is set to take up a new role in Saudi Arabia, although details of the position have not been disclosed.

CSK's Ruturaj Gaikwad under pressure after fifth successive failure in IPL 2026Ruturaj Gaikwad's struggles in IPL 2026 continued as the Chennai Super Kings captain registered his fifth successive failure, managing just 63 runs in five innings and failing to provide solid starts at the top.

Premier League: Head coach Andoni Iraola to leave Bournemouth at end of seasonAndoni Iraola is set to leave AFC Bournemouth at the end of the season. The 43-year-old Spaniard guided the Cherries to a ninth-place finish in the Premier League last season, their highest-ever points tally in the competition.

No MS Dhoni for CSK, Varun Chakravarthy returns for KKR in ChennaiCSK vs KKR: Kolkata Knight Riders made a key change in their bowling attack in their away game against Chennai Super Kings on Tuesday. Varun Chakravarthy returned to the line-up at the expense of Navdeep Saini.

How MS Dhoni's success mantra became key to Ayush Mhatre's U-19 World Cup winAhead of his maiden Under-19 World Cup stint as captain, Ayush Mhatre sought guidance from MS Dhoni, whose advice on staying calm under pressure shaped India's title-winning campaign.

SRH bowling attack depleted further as star pacer gets ruled out of IPL 2026IPL 2026: SunRisers Hyderabad's bowling stocks were further depleted on Tuesday, after their star pacer Brydon Carse was ruled out of the tournament. SRH have signed a replacement for the player.

Fuel crisis in India? Mohsin Naqvi's bizarre excuse for empty PSL stands stuns reporterPCB chief Mohsin Naqvi has faced backlash after claiming India faces a petrol crisis, even as PSL matches continue behind closed doors due to Pakistan's earlier cited fuel concerns.

Virat Kohli injury update: RCB star trains in Bengaluru. Will he play vs LSG?IPL 2026: Virat Kohli trained on Tuesday, batting fluently in the nets as concerns over his ankle injury eased. The star batter is likely to feature in RCB's home game against Lucknow Super Giants on Wednesday.

IPL 2026: Will Jacks set to join Mumbai Indians after missing first four gamesEngland all-rounder Will Jacks is set to arrive in India later this week to link up with Mumbai Indians, having missed the franchise's first four matches of the IPL 2026 season following a busy international schedule.

Samson to struggle against Narine? Irfan Pathan points out stat ahead of CSK vs KKRIrfan Pathan believes Sanju Samson could struggle against Sunil Narine, citing his poor record and low strike rate against the spinner. However, Samson's recent return to form makes their battle crucial, especially on a Chepauk, where spin could play a key role.

Yamal and Simeone in war of words before Barcelona face Atletico in UCL clashBarcelona face an uphill battle against Atletico Madrid in the Champions League quarterfinal second leg. After a 0-2 first-leg loss, Yamal and coach Hansi Flick remain optimistic about overturning the deficit despite Atletico's strong defensive setup.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi for Asian Games? Selectors feel 15-year-old is readyIPL 2026: The national selectors are convinced Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is ready for T20I cricket, but Ajit Agarkar's committee faces a selection dilemma due to a problem of plenty.

CSK vs KKR Highlights: Noor Ahmad wins it for Chennai, Kolkata sink furtherChennai Super Kings (CSK) vs Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) Highlights, IPL 2026: Ajinkya Rahane's Kolkata Knight Riders fail to chase 193 at the MA Chidambaram Stadium. Noor Ahmad spins his web and hands KKR a huge thrashing in Chennai.

IPL: How Krunal Pandya's rare skill set helps him outthink T20 battersIn a format that favours batters, Krunal Pandya continues to show that skill still matters. On a high-scoring night at the Wankhede Stadium, where 240 felt just about enough, his spell stood out for the control he had.

Shane Warne's son blames Covid vaccine for Australia legend's deathShane Warne's son Jackson said the "three or four" COVID-19 vaccine doses his father was "forced to take for work" may have contributed to his death, speaking on the '2 Worlds Collide' podcast.

Is Suryakumar Yadav losing ground? India's UK tour may define batter's next phaseSuryakumar Yadav faces scrutiny over his batting form despite leading India to T20 World Cup success, with questions over his long-term role ahead of the 2028 Olympics. The upcoming UK tour will be crucial, as consistency with the bat could determine his future in India's plans.

Pat Cummins to likely join Sunrisers Hyderabad on April 17Pat Cummins is expected to return to India by April 17 after a fitness test in Australia, which will determine whether he can rejoin Sunrisers Hyderabad for the ongoing IPL season. He has been recovering from a back injury since last July, and if cleared, he could be available for their next match on April 18, boosting their pace attack.

Ben Stokes rubbishes rift rumours with Brendon McCullum: Massive overstatementBen Stokes dismissed rift rumours with Brendon McCullum, insisting their partnership remains strong despite England's Ashes setback. He stressed that differences are healthy, with honest discussions helping them stay aligned and work towards the same goal.

Riyan Parag all style, does nothing else in IPL: Ex-India captain blasts RR skipperIPL 2026: Former India captain Kris Srikkanth tore into Riyan Parag's tactical calls and poor batting in Rajasthan Royals' heavy defeat to Sunrisers Hyderabad on Monday. Young pacers Praful Hinge and Sakib Hussain shone for the hosts in Hyderabad.

PCB bans Blessing Muzarabani for ditching Pak league and playing IPLThe Pakistan Cricket Board has handed a 2-year ban to Zimbabwe pacer Blessing Muzarabani from the PSL after he made a last-minute switch to play in the IPL.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
